items.original_text: In this paper, we introduce a novel training data selection based on the learning percentage of the samples. We assert that current language models possess the capability to autonomously select high-quality training data, leading to comparable or improved performance compared to training on the entire dataset.
items.claim_text: 本文提出基于样本学习百分比的训练数据选择方法，语言模型能够自主选择高质量训练数据，达到与完整数据集训练相当或更好的性能 [EV-001]

items.original_text: Our experiments span different-sized models, revealing that this characteristic holds for models ranging from 1B (small) to 13B (large) in size. Moreover, we demonstrate an interesting finding that the data hardness transfers across model sizes, and a smaller 350M model can effectively curate high-quality training data with hard samples for a larger 13B model, resulting in an equally or superior instruction-tuned model compared to training on the complete dataset.
items.claim_text: 数据选择性在1B到13B模型上均成立；数据硬度可跨模型规模迁移，350M小模型可为13B大模型有效筛选高质量困难训练样本，使大模型达到与全数据集训练相当或更优的性能 [EV-002]

items.original_text: For a data point after epoch-i, the learning percentage is defined as the percentage drop in perplexity during epoch-i compared to the total drop in perplexity by the end of training. ... LP(i) = (P_{i-1} - P_i) / (P_0 - P_n).
items.claim_text: 学习百分比LP(i)定义为第i个epoch中困惑度的下降占整个训练期间总下降的比例，公式为 LP(i) = (P_{i-1} - P_i) / (P_0 - P_n) [EV-003]
items.claim_location: §3 Learning Percentage as a Difficulty Metric

items.original_text: Since language models are known to learn most of the information in just one epoch (Komatsuzaki, 2019; Hoffmann et al., 2022; Zhang et al., 2022; Touvron et al., 2023), we consider LP(1) to rank the training data.
items.claim_text: 由于语言模型通常在一个epoch内学到大部分信息，本文使用第一个epoch的学习百分比LP(1)来对训练数据进行排序 [EV-004]
items.claim_location: §3 Learning Percentage as a Difficulty Metric

items.original_text: We observe that models trained on the bucket associated with the lowest LP(1) scores (33% Low LP(1)) consistently achieve scores exceeding 50, indicating that training on challenging samples alone is adequate for a robust instruction-tuning model.
items.claim_text: 在最低LP(1)分数桶（33%最难样本）上训练的模型，其胜率始终超过50，表明仅使用困难样本训练就足以获得鲁棒的指令微调模型 [EV-005]

items.original_text: The 33% High bucket results in worse performance than random selection for all models, highlighting that easy samples alone are insufficient.
items.claim_text: 在最高LP(1)分数桶（33%最容易样本）上训练的模型，性能比随机选择还差，表明仅用简单样本是不够的 [EV-006]
items.audit_note: claim声称'仅用3%的训练数据'，但原文说的是OPT-13B模型，claim未明确模型规模，可能误导为所有模型都适用

items.original_text: Strikingly, we observe a downward trend in the minimum percentage of difficult data required (denoted by Δ) for achieving a win rate of at least 50 with an increase in the model's size. For example, the OPT-13B model outperforms its full dataset counterpart with only 3% of the training data.
items.claim_text: 随着模型规模增大，达到50%胜率所需的最小困难数据比例下降；OPT-13B仅用3%的训练数据就优于全数据集训练的模型 [EV-007]

items.original_text: We find that the ranking of the Llama-2 7B model transfers effectively to the 13B model, resulting in a model of comparable or even improved quality in some instances. For example, in Figure 5(a), the win rate of the Llama-2-13B model trained on 10% of the Alpaca-Data, selected by the 7B model, outperforms the self-ranking of the 13B model by 4 points.
items.claim_text: Llama-2 7B模型的样本难度排序有效迁移到13B模型；用7B选出的10%数据训练13B模型，其胜率比13B自选数据训练高出4个百分点 [EV-008]
items.audit_note: claim声称'超过2.7B后达到自选性能水平'，但原文说的是'matching self-selection performance beyond a specific size threshold (2.7B)'，这是针对2.7B OPT模型，不是所有架构，claim扩大了适用范围

items.original_text: With only a 1.4-point drop in average win rate, even a small 350M model can be leveraged for curating training data for a large 13B model. This demonstrates that the data hardness transfers efficiently from a smaller model to a larger one, improving with the size of the smaller model and eventually matching self-selection performance beyond a specific size threshold (2.7B).
items.claim_text: 350M小模型可用于为13B大模型筛选训练数据，平均胜率仅下降1.4点；数据硬度迁移效率随小模型规模增大而提升，在超过2.7B后达到自选性能水平 [EV-009]

items.original_text: The Kendall-tau scores of LP(1) derived from OPT-models (350M, 1.3B, 2.7B, 6.7B) against OPT 13B on both Alpaca-Data and Dolly datasets are presented in Table 1. We note that all scores are positive, indicating a positive correlation. Notably, we observe a consistent increase in correlation with the increase in size of the ranking source model.
items.claim_text: 小模型与大模型之间LP(1)排序的Kendall-tau相关系数均为正，且随着小模型规模增大，相关性一致提高 [EV-010]

items.original_text: To compute LP_app(1), we only need to train the model once for 1 epoch, making it more efficient. ... Notably, we observe that the model trained on data selected via LP_app outperforms its counterpart trained on data selected via LP across the majority of models and various percentages.
items.claim_text: 近似指标LP_app只需训练一个epoch即可计算，在大多数模型和数据比例下，用LP_app筛选数据训练的模型性能优于用原始LP筛选的模型 [EV-011]

items.original_text: We compare LP_app with two baselines. ... Notably, we observe win rates exceeding 50 for all models trained on both datasets, indicating the superior quality of training data subsampled using our method. The superior performance of smaller OPT 1.3B and 2.7B models trained on self-selected data over Alpagasus, where the data is selected by a much larger GPT-3.5 model, underscores the effectiveness of our method.
items.claim_text: 在Alpaca-Data和Dolly数据集上，用LP_app筛选数据训练的模型胜率均超过50%，优于随机采样和Alpagasus（由GPT-3.5选择数据）；较小模型（1.3B/2.7B）自选数据表现优于GPT-3.5选择 [EV-012]

items.original_text: In this human evaluation, participants are asked to provide an instruction, after which both models generate a response. ... In 50 evaluations, the model trained on the full dataset was preferred, while in 58 evaluations, participants found the model trained on 5% data selected using our method to be better. This indicates that responses from the model trained on 5% of the data were either better or of equal quality compared to those from the model trained on the complete dataset in 66.2% of instances.
items.claim_text: 人类评估中，用5%精选数据训练的Llama-2 7B模型在66.2%的实例中响应质量优于或等于完整数据集训练的模型（58票优于，50票劣，42票平） [EV-013]

items.original_text: We observe that these difficult samples are longer than the average, maintaining coherence throughout. Specifically, the average response length within the 1% Low LP(1) subset of Alpaca-Data is 547 characters, contrasting with the dataset's average of 270.
items.claim_text: 困难样本（最低LP(1)的1%子集）的平均响应长度为547字符，而数据集平均为270字符，表明模型在生成长且连贯的文本时面临挑战 [EV-014]

items.original_text: We also found six noisy samples, shown in Table 5, i.e. a noise rate of 2.4%. Notably, this proportion is significantly higher compared to the prevalence observed across the entire dataset. AlpacaDataCleaned, a human-cleaned Alpaca-Data has eliminated 0.47% of noisy samples from the original dataset.
items.claim_text: 在最低LP(1)的困难样本子集中，噪声率为2.4%，显著高于完整数据集的噪声比例（AlpacaDataCleaned清理后仅为0.47%），表明困难子集包含更多噪声样本 [EV-015]
